meta.title: M/M/1 Single-Server Queue
meta.description: Canonical single-server queue. Poisson arrivals (lambda=0.8), exponential service (mu=1.0). Source -> Queue -> Processor -> Sink. Demonstrates queue length / waiting time / utilization matching closed-form M/M/1 theory. Run long with warmup to let the queue reach steady state.

expected.tolerance: util +/-0.05 abs; Lq/Wq within 15% (or theory inside 95% CI over replications)
